name: staffopt-v2
description: Explorium StaffOpt V2 - AI/ML Visitor Footfall Forecasting & Staff Planning Engine

scripts.build:deploy: npm run build && powershell -Command "Remove-Item -Path 'assets\*' -Force ; Copy-Item -Path 'frontend\dist\assets\*' -Destination 'assets' -Force ; Copy-Item -Path 'frontend\dist\index.html' -Destination 'index.html' -Force"
